summary: Security/tooling PR updating Rust OpenSSL lockfile entries in Cargo.lock after a Trivy report for CVE-2026-41676. The PR body claims an openssl upgrade from 0.10.63 to 0.10.78, but the diff shows openssl 0.10.63 to 0.10.81 and openssl-sys 0.9.99 to 0.9.117.

key_files.role: Rust lockfile updated for openssl and openssl-sys package versions/checksums; once_cell removed from openssl dependency list.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: openssl 0.10.63 -> 0.10.81, checksum changed, once_cell dependency removed

what_changed.text: Updated Cargo.lock package entry for openssl from version 0.10.63 to 0.10.81 with a new checksum.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: package name openssl version/checksum hunk

what_changed.text: Removed once_cell from the openssl dependency list in Cargo.lock.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: deleted dependency line "once_cell" under openssl

what_changed.text: Updated Cargo.lock package entry for openssl-sys from version 0.9.99 to 0.9.117 with a new checksum.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: package name openssl-sys version/checksum hunk

what_changed.text: PR body frames the change as a Trivy-driven fix for CVE-2026-41676 with claimed build pass, scanner re-scan fix, and LLM code review pass.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: Summary, Vulnerability, Evidence, Verification sections

smart_moves.text: Kept the actual diff narrow to Cargo.lock dependency resolution changes.

review_feedback.text: No human review comments are present in the slice.
Automated decomp-dev bot reported "No changes" for GALE01.
evidence_refs: text_corpus.jsonl: issue_comment by decomp-dev[bot], "Report for GALE01 ... No changes"

follow_up_queries: dependency security update no source changes

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR merged, one changed file, one issue comment, zero review comments
human_pr_text: claims openssl 0.10.63 -> 0.10.78 and lists Cargo.toml plus Cargo.lock
raw_diff: openssl actually changed to 0.10.81 and openssl-sys to 0.9.117
notes: The PR title/body say openssl 0.10.78, but the diff shows Cargo.lock upgraded openssl to 0.10.81.
The PR body lists Cargo.toml under Changes, but changed-file metadata and the loaded diff show only Cargo.lock.
Verification claims in the PR body are author-provided checkboxes; the slice does not include independent build logs or scanner output.
This PR contains no decompilation source changes, no assembly/matching tactic evidence, and no naming convention evidence.

source_update_candidates.title: Dependency-security PR intake: preserve diff-vs-body version mismatch
source_update_candidates.text: For PR 2677, record that the PR title/body describe openssl 0.10.63 -> 0.10.78 for CVE-2026-41676, while the actual Cargo.lock diff updates openssl to 0.10.81 and openssl-sys to 0.9.117. Treat the diff as the stronger evidence for what changed.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: openssl version line changed to 0.10.81
raw_diff: openssl-sys version line changed to 0.9.117
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful source-corpus annotation because the human PR text and actual diff disagree on the target openssl version.

rejection_notes: Do not promote a decompilation lesson from this PR; it is a Cargo.lock dependency update with no C/source matching evidence.
Do not accept the PR body's Cargo.toml change as a changed-file fact because loaded changed-file metadata and diff show only Cargo.lock.
Do not treat author checkbox verification as independent validation logs.
